original_image_tags: Large black circular hole punch marks are visible in the upper right and lower right corners of the page. Page number "xi" is centered at the bottom.

elements.description: A table titled 'ANNUAL LAUNCH SUMMARY BY BOOSTER' and 'Chart I 1958 - 1978'. It lists numerous launch vehicles in rows and years in columns, showing numerical counts of launches. The table includes a 'SUB TOTAL' column on the right and a 'SUB TOTAL' row at the bottom, with the final grand total being '1,418'.

judge.reason: The two descriptions refer to completely different visual content (Description A describes hole punches and a page number, while Description B describes a detailed chart or table).
